body.p1: This is the configured launch reserve address currently used by the site.
body.p2: Reserve balances and outgoing transactions come from the configured reserve wallet. Admin descriptions explain the purpose of each reserve spend, but the transaction list itself is based on wallet transaction history.
body.p3: No unavailable reserve data is estimated or filled in with fake values.
body.p4: The launch reserve is split across these categories.
body.p5: These are outgoing transactions from the configured reserve wallet. Descriptions are added in the protected admin section so each reserve spend can be explained publicly.
category.community_and_support.label: Community & Support
category.liquidity_and_listings.cover.4: Explorer hosting tied to exchange requirements
category.liquidity_and_listings.label: Liquidity & Listings
category.miner_growth.label: Miner Growth
data_basis.live_wallet: Live getwalletinfo balance and listtransactions send history from the configured HOBC launch reserve wallet.
hero.lead: The HOBC launch reserve is 8,400,000 HOBC, equal to 10% of the 84,000,000 HOBC total target supply.
hero.title: Launch Reserve
meta.title: Launch Reserve
notice.1: Transparency statement: Reserve balances and outgoing transactions must come from real chain tracking. Admin descriptions are explanatory notes and do not replace the public transaction record.
notice.no_outgoing_transactions: No outgoing reserve transactions found yet. If the reserve wallet is offline, this section will stay empty until live wallet tracking is available.
